reason: A Hong Kong cop lands in New York and must navigate unfamiliar streets and violent gangs as a total fish-out-of-water.
A New Yorker travels deep into the Amazon jungle to reclaim his son, bewildered by local customs and wild terrain.
An American tourist in London mistakes a real spy mission for an interactive show, comically misreading British society.
An insecure woman travels to Paris and hilariously struggles to fit into French social norms and language barriers.
A Japanese salaryman secretly joins a Western-style ballroom dance class, fumbling through unfamiliar steps and etiquette.
A young villager arrives in 1930s Shanghai to work for a Triad boss and must learn to survive in a foreign criminal underworld.
A British consul stumbles upon a hidden Himalayan city and must adapt to its strange customs and isolated way of life.
Three flamboyant drag queens road-trip across the Australian Outback, lost among small towns that don’t understand their culture.
A Chilean poet is exiled to a tiny Italian island and guided by a local postman as he learns to live in an alien culture.
A New Yorker lost in the Amazon learns the harsh rules of survival in a world he doesn’t recognize.
